source: Yahoo Sports / NBC Sports / Al Jazeera - 24 teams confirmed into R32; final group matches conclude June 27, R32 begins June 28
note: team -> furthest stage reached. 0=out,1=group/R32,2=R16,3=QF,4=SF,5=Final,6=Champion. Only teams that reached at least stage 1 are listed. Czech Republic and Turkey confirmed eliminated (omitted=0). Uncertain teams (Algeria, Austria, Belgium, Croatia, Egypt, England, Ghana, Iran, Portugal, Scotland, Senegal, Spain, Uruguay) omitted pending final group matches.
